Appearances:
Atty. Andrew Scher, Tel. No. 1-415-788-4545 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. levi Plesset of the law Office of Arthur D. Hidge, Tel. No. 1-760-814-7398
ppearing for the Defendant by telephone appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D; The court modified its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
Defendant Michael Hodges' motion for transfer of venue is granted per CCP 397(c). Although venue is proper in San Francisco, Mr. Hodges has shown that a transfer of the action to Los Angeles Superior Court, North Central District - Burbank, will promote the ends of justice. The ends of justice will be served by transferring this action to the Los Angeles Superior Court where it can be related to the already pending case between the parties before that court. Having two distinct cases involving substantially the same parties arising out of the same core facts pending approximately 400 miles from each other seriously disserves judicial economy. Defendant to pay all transfer costs within 10 days. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR # 8600 =302/hk
